creator: cullum@sacredheartsc.com
text:
Created attachment 257471
Change GSSAPI option use security/krb5

Postgresql fails to build against the base heimdal or the heimdal in ports due to a missing krb5 function (gss_store_cred_into).

This patch changes the GSSAPI option to use security/krb5 (MIT kerberos) and obsolesces the old MIT_KRB5 and HEIMDAL_KRB5 options.
